_doc: Every vendored dependency, pinned + versioned in ONE place. `npm run vendor:sync` rewrites vendored copies to these pins; `npm run vendor:check` fails if a copy has drifted. The build (deploy.sh) runs a sync so what ships always matches the pins. To UPDATE something, bump its ref/pin here (npm git-deps: also bump package.json, or `npm run vendor:bump-npm`).

npmGitDeps.name: @socioprophet/hellgraph
npmGitDeps.note: Installed via package.json (root + agent-machine). The build runs `npm install` so the pin actually takes effect — previously it did not, so this stayed 19 versions stale.

sourceFiles.name: sourceos-interaction-event
sourceFiles.stripPrefixRegex:
^// Generated from schemas/SourceOSInteractionEvent\.json\.
// Do not edit by hand\. Run: python tools/generate_sourceos_interaction_types\.py

unpinned.name: gaia-ontology
unpinned.note: Vendored from docs/30_GAIA_ONTOGENESIS_STEWARDSHIP_GRAPH.md. Needs a pinned {ref, sourcePath} to move into sourceFiles and auto-sync.

unpinned.name: slash-topics-core
unpinned.note: Hand-vendored JSON. Needs an upstream repo+ref to auto-sync.

unpinned.name: proof-fabric-validator
unpinned.note: Vendored PFK Draft2020 validator. Needs an upstream repo+ref to auto-sync.
